nasb.text: “For both prophet and priest are polluted; Even in My house I have found their wickedness,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: “Both prophet and priest are ungodly; even in my house I have found their evil, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “先知和祭司都不敬虔， 甚至在我殿裡我也看見他們的邪惡。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“先知和祭司都不敬虔， 我甚至看见他们在我的圣殿里行恶。
